name: Customer Persona Builder
description: Create detailed customer personas from market research

agents.name: Market Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the target market and customer segments
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the target market. Find: demographics, psychographics, behaviors, pain points, buying patterns, media consumption, and decision-making factors. Look for survey data and market research reports.

agents.name: Persona Builder
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create 3-4 detailed customer personas with: name and photo description, demographics (age, income, education, location), psychographics (values, goals, fears), day-in-the-life narrative, pain points, buying triggers, objections, preferred channels, and a quote that captures their mindset. Include a persona comparison matrix.

author: agentfactory
